name: Carroll County Recs and Parks (Robert Moton)
description: This facility is shared between the Senior Center and Recs & Parks. The Recs & Parks schedule is maintained here.
open_play_schedule: There is an online sign up at Recs & Parks. The session will be cancelled if less than 4 sign up.

name: Carroll Vista Community Association
description: Carroll Vista Community Association is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Taneytown, MD. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Charles Carroll Community Center
description: A new facility.

name: Christmas Tree Park
description: These courts are due to be resurfaced. Funding is always an issue.

name: Coppermine 4 Seasons
description: There are lessons, leagues and tournaments at this location.

name: Coppermine Panther Plex (Old North Carroll HS)
description:
3 courts upper gym has a rubberized floor for wrestling. 3 courts lower gym with wood floor. 
6 outdoor courts use tennis net as pickleball net.
open_play_schedule: Contact Coppermine to schedule time for your group.
fees: Private — $10 per time or $25 per month, up to 3 times per week.

name: Dill Dinkers Finksburg MD
description: Dill Dinkers Finksburg MD is a place to play pickleball in Finksburg, MD. There are 12 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved.

name: Gerstell Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Gerstell Academy in Finksburg, MD! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Hampstead Memorial Park - Greenmount
description:
Melvin Miller Memorial Park offers two tennis courts, pickleball, and an all-purpose blacktop court and is located on Main Street near the northern railroad crossing.
The courts are to be resurfaced. The city will convert them into combo courts so 4 pickleball courts can be used with your own nets or 2 pickleball courts using the tennis nets.
hours: Monday - Friday 8:30 am - 4:30 pm Site Map | Accessibility Statement | Contact Us Government Websites by Catalis | Privacy Policy

name: Hill YMCA in Westminster
description: Hill YMCA in Westminster provides a variety of activities: a fitness center, swimming pool, cycling, dance, and a gym for pickleball. Membership is required.

name: Merritt Athletic Eldersburg
description: Come play pickleball at Merritt Athletic Eldersburg in Sykesville, MD! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: New Windsor Sulpher Springs Park
description: These courts are behind the fire hall at 111 High Street. They are combo courts: 4 courts with portable nets or 2 courts using tennis nets.

name: North Carroll Middle School (Back Gym)
description: North Carroll Middle School (Back Gym) is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hampstead, MD. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like water, restrooms, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.
hours: 8:30am to 3:05pm 410-751-3440 FAX: 410-751-3464 Stay Connected Facebook (opens in new window/tab) Twitter (opens in new window/tab) YouTube (opens in new window/tab) Directions (opens in new window/tab) Employment Opportunities (opens in new window/tab) Wi-Fi Access On School Grounds (opens in new window/tab) Site Map Public Information Act Privacy Policy General Disclaimer Legal Statements Accessibility Statement Powered by Finalsite

name: Piney Run Park
description: Come play pickleball at Piney Run Park in Sykesville, MD! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: South Carroll Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at South Carroll Senior Center in Sykesville, MD! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: There are two groups playing here: Intermediates and Advanced Intermediates. Intermediates play MWF 9:30AM-12:30PM and TTH 12:30PM-3:45PM. Advanced Intermediate play TTH 9:30AM-12:30PM and MWF 12:30PM-3:45PM.

name: Taneytown Memorial Park
description: These are combo courts. You can either bring your own nets or play over the 3 tennis nets.

name: Town Mall of Westminster
description: Town Mall of Westminster is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Westminster, MD. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, trainers or lessons, lights, and food. You can reserve the courts.

name: Westminster City Park
description: The lighted outdoor courts have 6 permanents nets and 4 combo courts on two tennis courts. They are open play. There are spring, summer, and fall leagues, and an early summer tournament. Informal groups play there. Several methods of communication are used within groups.

name: Westminster Family Fitness Center
description: The Family Fitness Center has 3 indoor courts. You can sign up through Band. Free to Fitness Center members.
open_play_schedule: Sign up using Band. More times are being considered.
fees: Fee required — Free to Fitness Center members.

name: Westminster Jay Cee Park
description: These are new courts. A sealant was placed on the asphalt that has not sealed the surface. It is hoped that over time it will improve. Plans are to paint the courts using two colors in the spring of 2025,

name: Westminster King Park
description: This is a combo court. two courts using your own nets or one court using the tennis net.

name: Westminster Mall Fun n Fit Factory
description: Westminster Mall Fun n Fit Factory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Westminster, MD. There are 5 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Westminster Senior Center (Robert Moton)
description: Sign up at Westminster Senior Center. Play at Robert Moton Gym.
